name: Brex
philosophy: Dark-editorial financial magazine for ambitious mid-market — coffee-black canvas, amber voltage, serif display at magazine-cover scale, surface-flip rhythm between coffee bands and cream pricing.

design_language.motion_signature: 220ms ease-out hover with amber glow ring; slow 40% parallax shift on hero photography on scroll.

trademark_signals: Coffee-black canvas with amber accent — a maturation away from earlier neon Brex
Photographic art direction — real founders, never stock
Massive serif display at 80-104px — magazine cover scale
Surface flip between coffee bands and cream pricing — the rhythm is the brand
Tabular figures on every dollar amount
ai_slop_avoided: Don't render a light-mode hero — coffee is the entry point
Don't add mascot characters or playful illustrations
Don't render serif display heavier than weight 500
